title: Fancy Dress

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two switches
record:
"next" on one switch 
"wear it" on the other
sections.middleText2:
selection of dress up items
someone to dress up, which could be the switch user

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Hold up a dress-up item.
2. If the switch user presses "next", show the next item.
3. If they press "wear it", the chosen person wears that item.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to scan through dress up items
